case_title: DEBORAH BETH KIRSCH VS. BONILLA CONSTRUCTION ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-28-2022 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY KIRSCH, DEBORAH BETH AS TO DEFENDANT BONILLA CONSTRUCTION WESTERN SURETY COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-28-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DEBORAH BETH KIRSCH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BONILLA CONSTRUCTION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MIGUEL ANGEL BONILLA, OWNER. DEFENDANT WESTERN SURETY COMPANY IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON DEFENDANT BONILLA CONSTRUCTION. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE ON DEFENDANT WESTERN SURETY COMPANY. BONILLA CONSTRUTIONS WAVIES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF DISMISSES THE CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT WESTERN SURETY COMPANY SO THE CASE CAN BE HEARD TODAY. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE FEB-28TH HEARING IF THE AGREEMENT IS NOT MET. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. THE COURT ALLOWS THE PLAINTIFF TO SERVICE AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT WESTERN SURETY COMPANY IF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT BREAKS DOWN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE DONE ON 1/26/22 (SERVICE FEE $299) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRSCH, DEBORAH BETH AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN SURETY COMPANY
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRSCH, DEBORAH BETH AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN SURETY COMPANY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CT CORPORATION SYSTEM) SERVED NOV-23-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN SURETY COMPANY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT BONILLA CONSTRUCTION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-28-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-28-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF DEBORAH BETH KIRSCH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BONILLA CONSTRUCTION IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WESTERN SURETY COMPANY IS NOT PRESENT. THE PREVIOUS SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT BROKE DOWN. THE CASE AGAINST WESTERN SURETY COMPANY IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIRSCH, DEBORAH BETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BONILLA CONSTRUCTION $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,225.00, CASE AGAINST WESTERN SURETY IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
